chapter: Chapter: Verghese Kurien—I Too Had A Dream

questions.question: Who was Verghese Kurien?
questions.answer: An Indian engineer and social entrepreneur known as the Father of the White Revolution.

questions.question: What revolution is associated with Verghese Kurien?
questions.answer: The White Revolution.

questions.question: Why is Verghese Kurien called the Father of the White Revolution?
questions.answer: Because he led the movement that transformed India’s dairy industry.

questions.question: Where was Verghese Kurien posted for his work in the dairy sector?
questions.answer: Anand in Gujarat.

questions.question: What was Kurien’s profession?
questions.answer: He was an engineer.

questions.question: What problem did dairy farmers face before Kurien’s efforts?
questions.answer: They were exploited by middlemen and received low prices for milk.

questions.question: What system did Kurien introduce to help farmers?
questions.answer: The cooperative system.

questions.question: What is AMUL?
questions.answer: A dairy cooperative brand established to help farmers market their milk.

questions.question: What nationwide program did Kurien launch to improve milk production?
questions.answer: Operation Flood.

questions.question: What was the purpose of Operation Flood?
questions.answer: To increase milk production and create a national milk distribution system.

questions.question: What is a dairy cooperative?
questions.answer: An organization where farmers work together to sell milk collectively.

questions.question: How did the cooperative system benefit farmers?
questions.answer: It ensured fair prices and improved their income.

questions.question: How did Kurien’s work help rural communities?
questions.answer: It improved farmers’ income and strengthened rural economies.

questions.question: What role did innovation play in Kurien’s work?
questions.answer: Innovation helped improve milk production, processing, and distribution.

questions.question: What leadership quality helped Kurien succeed?
questions.answer: Vision and determination.

questions.question: How did Kurien empower farmers?
questions.answer: By organizing them into cooperatives and giving them control over milk production and sales.

questions.question: What was the impact of the White Revolution on India?
questions.answer: India became one of the largest milk producers in the world.

questions.question: What does Kurien’s life teach about perseverance?
questions.answer: That determination and hard work can overcome challenges.

questions.question: What does the chapter highlight about cooperation?
questions.answer: Cooperation helps people achieve collective economic success.

questions.question: What role did education play in Kurien’s achievements?
questions.answer: His engineering education helped him apply technical knowledge to improve the dairy sector.

questions.question: How did Kurien’s work improve the dairy industry?
questions.answer: By introducing cooperative systems and improving production and distribution.

questions.question: What quality made Kurien an inspiring leader?
questions.answer: His dedication to improving farmers’ lives.

questions.question: What message does Kurien’s story give to young people?
questions.answer: Dreams and determination can bring positive change to society.

questions.question: Why is Verghese Kurien considered a visionary leader?
questions.answer: Because he saw the potential of cooperative dairy farming to transform India.

questions.question: What is the main message of the chapter?
questions.answer: Dreams, determination, and cooperation can transform society.
